_comment: UptimeRobot v3 batch import payload. Pre-fill `api_key` with your Main API Key from https://uptimerobot.com/dashboard.html#mySettings (Settings → API). Then: curl -X POST https://api.uptimerobot.com/v3/monitors/batch -d @uptime-robot-config.json -H 'Content-Type: application/json'

monitors._comment: type=1 is HTTP(s); interval=60 is seconds (1-min checks)

monitors._comment_on_keyword: type=2 is keyword check; UptimeRobot considers the monitor up if the HTTP response status code does NOT match the keyword. We invert: monitor flips DOWN if the gateway returns 404 (which would be wrong — it should be 400)
keyword_type=1 = exists; UptimeRobot flips DOWN if '1.0.1' is NOT present in the response body. Bump to '1.2.0' after the v1.2.0 publish completes
